completion_criteria_checked: A new script scripts/classify-routing.ps1 exists, is read-only, reads .cockpit/state/task-state.json by default with a path override parameter, writes no file or state, and invokes no other script.

The classifier emits exactly one routing class from the closed set {local_deterministic, model_judgment, mixed, unknown} using only mechanical signals from task state: task_safety_class plus literal case-insensitive keyword matches against task_title and task_objective.

The output plainly reports the detected routing class, the signals used (task_safety_class and matched keywords), and an advisory recommendation tied to DECISION-002 while explicitly labeling itself advisory, non-gating, and non-executing.

The script was functionally re-run independently against the real .cockpit/state/task-state.json, synthetic deterministic and judgment-heavy task-state inputs, and malformed-json and missing-file failure cases; success cases returned sane classifications and failure cases exited non-zero cleanly.
docs/DECISIONS.md records DECISION-075 for this capability, and README.md includes the needed note that the first Path-A local-first routing advisory is delivered.

No existing script, schema, verdict, task status, Owner Review Matrix row, Task Safety Class, Acceptance Boundary Rule, or log event type was modified for this task; the classifier does not call scripts/log-event.ps1 or any other script.
scripts/verify-handback-guardrails.ps1 was re-run independently by the verifier and completed cleanly for task_status returned_for_verification.
evidence_reviewed: scripts/verify-handback-guardrails.ps1 output re-run independently via pwsh -NoProfile -File
Independent functional runs of scripts/classify-routing.ps1 against the real task-state.json, synthetic deterministic and judgment-heavy inputs, malformed JSON, and a missing-file path
Select-String scan of scripts/classify-routing.ps1 for script invocation indicators
risks: The classifier is intentionally a mechanical keyword heuristic and may misclassify edge cases; this is disclosed in its own output and does not create enforcement risk because the script is advisory-only.

The live worktree also contains unrelated DECISION-074 / docs/CCB_PCC_RELATIONSHIP.md changes outside this task's claimed file list; no evidence reviewed tied those changes to pcc-pathA-001, so this verdict is based on the task-scoped artifacts and behavior actually verified.
summary: Independent verification found pcc-pathA-001 complete within its bounded scope. The new classify-routing script is present, read-only, advisory-only, mechanically classifies routing suitability from task-state signals, reports its firing signals and DECISION-002 recommendation clearly, fails cleanly on bad input, and passed the verifier's independent local guardrail re-run.
next_action: Task complete; owner/advisor selects the next backlog item.
